meta.title: Mott Larbe — learn Chechen through reading
meta.description: Language platform: real texts with click-to-translate, morphological analysis and personal vocabulary. Levels A1–C2.

hero.sub: Real texts with instant click-to-translate, morphological breakdown and a personal vocabulary. No tab-switching, no dictionary lookups.
hero.readerOriginal: Цхьа де тхо хьалха гIайгIане хилларехь, амма цул тIаьхьа кхета луучу хан йоьссира.
hero.readerTranslation: At dawn we walked quietly, and then I began to understand.

features.title: Everything you need to read in Chechen
features.sub: The platform is built around one idea: every word is an entry point into the dictionary. Here's what that gives you in practice.

click.title: Click → translation
click.desc: Click any word — a card appears instantly: translation, base form, grammatical form, examples.

morphology.title: Morphology
morphology.desc: The complex grammar of Chechen is parsed automatically: cases, classes, tenses. Lemmatization and normalization.

dictionary.title: Personal vocabulary
dictionary.desc: Saved words, folders, statuses (new / learning / known), statistics and quick search through your entries.

srs.title: Spaced repetition
srs.desc: SM-2 algorithm + the proprietary Decks system: NEW → OLD → NUMBERED. Cards adapt to your pace.

texts.title: Real texts
texts.desc: Literature, history, folktales, news. Texts with A1–C2 levels, tags, reading time and automatic difficulty scoring.

progress.title: Progress and statistics
progress.desc: Streaks, weekly activity, text progress, word-by-level breakdown. See what you learned and when.

how.title: Three steps to fluent reading
how.sub: No need to cram word lists — learn the language in its natural environment.

choose.title: Pick a text
choose.desc: Library by levels A1–C2 with tags, difficulty score and reading time. Want it simpler — pick A1.

read.title: Read and click
read.desc: Unfamiliar word — click. Translation, base form and grammar appear right in the text. One click — added to vocabulary.

review.title: Reinforce by review
review.desc: A short review session every day. The system knows which words to show today and which to postpone.

demo.title: Reading as it is
demo.sub: This is what a regular reading session looks like. Highlights show what the system knows about each word.
demo.textTitle: Chechen folklore · A young man's tale

pricing.title: Simple pricing, no surprises
pricing.sub: Start free. When you want more — switch to Premium or Pro.

items.q: What level can I start at?
items.a: Any. The platform suits both complete beginners (A1) and those who already read fluently (C1–C2). Texts are organised by level, so you can begin with the simplest.

items.q: How do «Decks» differ from regular spaced repetition?
items.a: They're two independent systems. SM-2 is the classic algorithm with intervals and 0–5 ratings. Decks is a proprietary system: words are distributed across decks (NEW → OLD → NUMBERED), numbered decks rotate every day. Use either — or both.
Yes, anytime in one click. Access to paid features stays until the end of the paid period — then the account switches to the free plan automatically without losing data.

items.q: What happens to my vocabulary if I stop using the service?
items.a: Your personal vocabulary, text progress and review history are preserved as long as the account exists. They can be exported anytime.
Currently — Chechen (CHE) with translation to Russian (RU). The architecture supports adding other languages; new directions will be added based on community requests.
The web version is adapted for phones and tablets — opens in a browser and works like a native app. Dedicated iOS/Android apps are planned.

cta.sub: Free plan — no credit card. A couple of clicks until your first text.
cta.foot: You can switch to a paid plan anytime. Cancel in one click.

footer.about: A language platform for learning Chechen through reading real texts with instant translation.

nav.freePlanDesc: Up to 200 words. Unlock more features.
